target_idiom: ช้างตายทั้งตัว เอาใบบัวมาปิด
source_meaning: alternative form of رَشَّ السُّكْرَ عَلَى المَوْتِ (rašša s-sukra ʕalā l-mawti)
target_meaning: alternative form of ช้างตายทั้งตัวเอาใบบัวมาปิด (cháang-dtaai-táng-dtuua-ao-bai-buua-maa-bpìt)

target_idiom: หมองูตายเพราะงู
source_meaning: Locals or natives are most familiar with their own territory; insiders or experts know best about their field or area.
target_meaning: one who perishes because of something which one has the best knowledge about or is very familiar with.

target_idiom: หมาหัวเน่า
target_meaning: person generally despised or avoided: outcast, pariah, leper, etc.

target_idiom: ออกหน้าออกตา
target_meaning: openly; in an open manner; without reservation or concealment.
